## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

- [ ] Fix

## API lifecycle checks (if API changed)

- [ ] Classified as breaking/non-breaking
- [ ] `docs/development/API_LIFECYCLE.md` followed
- [ ] Versioning/deprecation impact documented
- [ ] Contract/integration tests updated

## Test evidence

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Critical-path tests
- [ ] E2E tests (if UI/user flow changed)

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] Wiki update needed (if yes, update `docs/wiki/*`)
- [ ] Release notes/changelog updated

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollout plan:
- Rollback plan:
